items.text: I usually strive to do things as perfectly as possible.
items.text_en: I usually strive to do things as perfectly as possible.
items.text_zh: 我做事时通常会追求尽善尽美。

items.text: I usually do my best to help others.
items.text_en: I usually do my best to help others.
items.text_zh: 我通常会尽力帮助他人。

items.text: It matters a lot to me whether other people like me.
items.text_en: It matters a lot to me whether other people like me.
items.text_zh: 我很在意别人是否喜欢我。

items.text: It is very important to me to accomplish something significant in life.
items.text_en: It is very important to me to accomplish something significant in life.
items.text_zh: 对我来说，成就一番事业非常重要。

items.text: In many situations, I am able to make a key contribution.
items.text_en: In many situations, I am able to make a key contribution.
items.text_zh: 在很多事情上，我通常能做出比较关键的贡献。

items.text: I tend to experience my emotions deeply.
items.text_en: I tend to experience my emotions deeply.
items.text_zh: 我的情绪体验通常比较深刻而丰富。

items.text: I often feel that other people do not truly understand me.
items.text_en: I often feel that other people do not truly understand me.
items.text_zh: 我常觉得别人很难真正理解我。

items.text: I enjoy thinking about things in depth.
items.text_en: I enjoy thinking about things in depth.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢深入思考问题。

items.text: I tend to prepare ahead of time for possible risks or unexpected problems.
items.text_en: I tend to prepare ahead of time for possible risks or unexpected problems.
items.text_zh: 我习惯提前为可能出现的风险或突发情况做准备。

items.text: It is very important to me to avoid pain and discomfort whenever I can.
items.text_en: It is very important to me to avoid pain and discomfort whenever I can.
items.text_zh: 对我来说，尽量避免痛苦和不适非常重要。

items.text: I actively seek out experiences that make me feel happy or excited.
items.text_en: I actively seek out experiences that make me feel happy or excited.
items.text_zh: 我会主动寻找能让我感到快乐或兴奋的体验。

items.text: No matter the situation, I tend to focus on the positive side.
items.text_en: No matter the situation, I tend to focus on the positive side.
items.text_zh: 无论处境如何，我都倾向于看到积极的一面。

items.text: When I think someone is wrong, I say so directly.
items.text_en: When I think someone is wrong, I say so directly.
items.text_zh: 当我认为别人有问题时，我会直接指出来。

items.text: I tend to let other people make the decisions.
items.text_en: I tend to let other people make the decisions.
items.text_zh: 我习惯由别人来做决定。

items.text: I believe people should follow established rules and systems.
items.text_en: I believe people should follow established rules and systems.
items.text_zh: 我认为大家应该遵守既定的规则和制度。

items.text: Feeling secure is one of the most important things to me.
items.text_en: Feeling secure is one of the most important things to me.
items.text_zh: 对我来说，安全感是最重要的事之一。

items.text: I spend a lot of time thinking about what might happen in the future.
items.text_en: I spend a lot of time thinking about what might happen in the future.
items.text_zh: 我经常花很多心思去想未来可能会发生什么。

items.text: I often feel out of place with most people around me.
items.text_en: I often feel out of place with most people around me.
items.text_zh: 我常觉得自己和周围的大多数人格格不入。

items.text: If a way of doing things already works well, I do not see much reason to change it.
items.text_en: If a way of doing things already works well, I do not see much reason to change it.
items.text_zh: 我认为已经行之有效的做事方式，没有必要轻易改变。

items.text: I am usually able to handle everyday chores and routines in an orderly way.
items.text_en: I am usually able to handle everyday chores and routines in an orderly way.
items.text_zh: 我通常能按部就班地完成每天的琐事或日常事务。

items.text: I am always trying to improve myself.
items.text_en: I am always trying to improve myself.
items.text_zh: 我一直在努力让自己变得更完善。

items.text: I check my work very carefully for mistakes.
items.text_en: I check my work very carefully for mistakes.
items.text_zh: 我会非常仔细地检查自己是否出错。

items.text: I am willing to spend time helping people who need me.
items.text_en: I am willing to spend time helping people who need me.
items.text_zh: 我愿意把时间花在那些需要我帮助的人身上。

items.text: In my social circles, I want to be someone who has influence.
items.text_en: In my social circles, I want to be someone who has influence.
items.text_zh: 在社交圈中，我希望自己是有影响力的人。

items.text: Being successful is very important to me.
items.text_en: Being successful is very important to me.
items.text_zh: 获得成功对我来说非常重要。

items.text: I see myself as playing an important role in the groups or organizations I belong to.
items.text_en: I see myself as playing an important role in the groups or organizations I belong to.
items.text_zh: 我觉得自己在所属的组织中扮演着重要角色。

items.text: I often feel overwhelmed by my emotions.
items.text_en: I often feel overwhelmed by my emotions.
items.text_zh: 我经常感觉自己被情绪淹没。

items.text: I have always felt different from other people.
items.text_en: I have always felt different from other people.
items.text_zh: 我一直觉得自己与众不同。

items.text: I like to analyze things from different angles.
items.text_en: I like to analyze things from different angles.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢从不同角度分析事情。

items.text: If something goes wrong, I usually already have a backup plan.
items.text_en: If something goes wrong, I usually already have a backup plan.
items.text_zh: 如果事情出了问题，我通常已经准备好了备选方案。

items.text: I deliberately avoid situations that are likely to bring up negative feelings.
items.text_en: I deliberately avoid situations that are likely to bring up negative feelings.
items.text_zh: 我会刻意回避那些容易引发负面情绪的场合。

items.text: I enjoy excitement and novelty.
items.text_en: I enjoy excitement and novelty.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢追求刺激和新鲜感。

items.text: When other people complain, I can usually see the positive side of the situation.
items.text_en: When other people complain, I can usually see the positive side of the situation.
items.text_zh: 当别人抱怨时，我通常能看到事情积极的一面。

items.text: When someone is behaving inappropriately, I will point it out directly, even in public.
items.text_en: When someone is behaving inappropriately, I will point it out directly, even in public.
items.text_zh: 当别人做得不妥时，即使在公开场合，我也会直接指出来。

items.text: I tend to go along with what other people want.
items.text_en: I tend to go along with what other people want.
items.text_zh: 我习惯顺着他人的意愿来做。

items.text: I believe things should be done according to the rules, rather than everyone doing whatever they want.
items.text_en: I believe things should be done according to the rules, rather than everyone doing whatever they want.
items.text_zh: 我认为做事应该按规矩来，而不是各行其是。

items.text: I actively build relationships that help me feel safe and supported.
items.text_en: I actively build relationships that help me feel safe and supported.
items.text_zh: 我会主动建立能给我带来安全感的人际关系。

items.text: I can often see fairly clearly what is likely to happen in the future.
items.text_en: I can often see fairly clearly what is likely to happen in the future.
items.text_zh: 我往往能比较清晰地预见未来可能发生的情况。

items.text: Some of my interests or ideas seem a little unusual to the people around me.
items.text_en: Some of my interests or ideas seem a little unusual to the people around me.
items.text_zh: 我的某些兴趣或想法，在周围人看来会显得有点“怪”。

items.text: I prefer doing things in familiar, time-tested ways.
items.text_en: I prefer doing things in familiar, time-tested ways.
items.text_zh: 我更喜欢按熟悉的老办法做事。

items.text: Once I take on a task, I do not stop easily until it is finished.
items.text_en: Once I take on a task, I do not stop easily until it is finished.
items.text_zh: 只要任务还没完成，我就不会轻易停下来。

items.text: I spend a lot of time noticing my shortcomings and trying to improve them.
items.text_en: I spend a lot of time noticing my shortcomings and trying to improve them.
items.text_zh: 我会花很多时间去发现并改进自己的缺点和不足。

items.text: I hold myself to very high standards.
items.text_en: I hold myself to very high standards.
items.text_zh: 我对自己的要求很高。

items.text: Caring for and looking after others comes naturally to me.
items.text_en: Caring for and looking after others comes naturally to me.
items.text_zh: 我天生就喜欢照顾和关心别人。

items.text: I want to be recognized and appreciated by others.
items.text_en: I want to be recognized and appreciated by others.
items.text_zh: 我渴望得到别人的认可和赞赏。

items.text: I want to accomplish many important goals in life.
items.text_en: I want to accomplish many important goals in life.
items.text_zh: 我希望在人生中实现许多重要的目标。

items.text: When it comes to solving problems, I am usually more decisive and efficient than the people around me.
items.text_en: When it comes to solving problems, I am usually more decisive and efficient than the people around me.
items.text_zh: 在处理问题时，我通常比周围的人更果断、更有效率。

items.text: I often feel deep sadness over people or things I have lost.
items.text_en: I often feel deep sadness over people or things I have lost.
items.text_zh: 对于已经失去的人或事，我常会感到深切的悲伤。

items.text: Deep down, I feel that there is something very distinctive about me.
items.text_en: Deep down, I feel that there is something very distinctive about me.
items.text_zh: 我觉得自己骨子里就是个很特别的人。

items.text: Compared with most people, I am more willing to spend time trying to understand the underlying nature of things.
items.text_en: Compared with most people, I am more willing to spend time trying to understand the underlying nature of things.
items.text_zh: 相比大多数人，我更愿意花时间去钻研事物的本质。

items.text: It is very important to me to be prepared for unexpected situations.
items.text_en: It is very important to me to be prepared for unexpected situations.
items.text_zh: 对我来说，提前准备好应对突发情况非常重要。

items.text: When sadness comes up, I find something to do to take my mind off it.
items.text_en: When sadness comes up, I find something to do to take my mind off it.
items.text_zh: 当伤感涌上来时，我会找点事让自己分散注意力。

items.text: When life starts to feel dull, I make changes to break out of the routine.
items.text_en: When life starts to feel dull, I make changes to break out of the routine.
items.text_zh: 生活一旦变得无聊，我就会主动做些改变，打破这种状态。

items.text: I tend to be more optimistic than most people.
items.text_en: I tend to be more optimistic than most people.
items.text_zh: 我往往比大多数人更乐观。

items.text: Even if it may be hard to hear, I am willing to say what I really think.
items.text_en: Even if it may be hard to hear, I am willing to say what I really think.
items.text_zh: 即使话可能不好听，我也愿意把真实想法说出来。

items.text: I would rather go along with the majority than forcefully push my own views.
items.text_en: I would rather go along with the majority than forcefully push my own views.
items.text_zh: 我宁愿顺着多数人的意见，也不愿强行坚持自己的主张。

items.text: I feel more comfortable in organizations with clear structure and hierarchy.
items.text_en: I feel more comfortable in organizations with clear structure and hierarchy.
items.text_zh: 在层级分明、结构清晰的组织里，我会觉得更自在。

items.text: I do whatever I can to protect the safety of myself and my family.
items.text_en: I do whatever I can to protect the safety of myself and my family.
items.text_zh: 我会尽可能采取各种措施，保护自己和家人的安全。

items.text: I make long-term plans for the next several years.
items.text_en: I make long-term plans for the next several years.
items.text_zh: 我会为未来几年制定长期规划。

items.text: I feel there are unique qualities in me that would be hard to replace.
items.text_en: I feel there are unique qualities in me that would be hard to replace.
items.text_zh: 我觉得自己身上有一些别人难以替代的独特之处。

items.text: I do not especially like trying new methods or procedures.
items.text_en: I do not especially like trying new methods or procedures.
items.text_zh: 我不太喜欢尝试新的方法或流程。

items.text: I take my responsibilities and obligations very seriously.
items.text_en: I take my responsibilities and obligations very seriously.
items.text_zh: 我非常看重自己的责任和义务。

items.text: I like reading books that help me be more effective or develop my professional skills.
items.text_en: I like reading books that help me be more effective or develop my professional skills.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢阅读能提升效率或专业能力的书。

items.text: I often put a lot of pressure on myself to do things the right way.
items.text_en: I often put a lot of pressure on myself to do things the right way.
items.text_zh: 为了把事情做好，我常会给自己很大压力。

items.text: I take the initiative to help other people so life will be a little easier for them.
items.text_en: I take the initiative to help other people so life will be a little easier for them.
items.text_zh: 我会主动帮助他人，让他们过得轻松一点。

items.text: I work to make a good impression on other people.
items.text_en: I work to make a good impression on other people.
items.text_zh: 我会努力给别人留下好印象。

items.text: I set ambitious goals for myself.
items.text_en: I set ambitious goals for myself.
items.text_zh: 我为自己设定了雄心勃勃的目标。

items.text: I play an important role in my social circle.
items.text_en: I play an important role in my social circle.
items.text_zh: 我是自己社交圈中的重要成员。

items.text: I can describe my feelings in a nuanced and detailed way.
items.text_en: I can describe my feelings in a nuanced and detailed way.
items.text_zh: 我能细腻而深入地描述自己的情绪感受。

items.text: I often feel like an outsider.
items.text_en: I often feel like an outsider.
items.text_zh: 我经常觉得自己像个局外人。

items.text: I feel that my inner world is rich and interesting.
items.text_en: I feel that my inner world is rich and interesting.
items.text_zh: 我觉得自己的内心世界非常丰富，也很有趣。

items.text: I am usually quick to notice where things could go wrong.
items.text_en: I am usually quick to notice where things could go wrong.
items.text_zh: 我通常能敏锐地察觉到事情可能会出问题的地方。

items.text: I am good at staying away from situations that bring me down.
items.text_en: I am good at staying away from situations that bring me down.
items.text_zh: 我很擅长避开那些会让我消沉的处境。

items.text: I am usually willing to try new things or go on new adventures.
items.text_en: I am usually willing to try new things or go on new adventures.
items.text_zh: 我通常愿意开启新的尝试或冒险。

items.text: I believe things will ultimately work out for the best.
items.text_en: I believe things will ultimately work out for the best.
items.text_zh: 我相信事情最终会朝好的方向发展。

items.text: Even if it may offend people, I will still stand by what I believe.
items.text_en: Even if it may offend people, I will still stand by what I believe.
items.text_zh: 即使可能冒犯别人，我也会坚持表达自己的立场。

items.text: I am used to letting other people take the lead.
items.text_en: I am used to letting other people take the lead.
items.text_zh: 我习惯让别人来掌握主导权。

items.text: I strongly dislike people who break rules and disrupt order.
items.text_en: I strongly dislike people who break rules and disrupt order.
items.text_zh: 我很反感那些不守规矩、破坏秩序的人。

items.text: I actively build connections with people who make me feel safe and secure.
items.text_en: I actively build connections with people who make me feel safe and secure.
items.text_zh: 我会主动结交那些能给我带来安全感和保障的人。

items.text: I tend to pay attention to what changes or developments may be coming next.
items.text_en: I tend to pay attention to what changes or developments may be coming next.
items.text_zh: 我习惯关注接下来可能发生的变化和动向。

items.text: My interests and concerns are often different from those of most people.
items.text_en: My interests and concerns are often different from those of most people.
items.text_zh: 我的兴趣和关注点常常与大多数人不太一样。

items.text: I believe traditional methods are often more reliable.
items.text_en: I believe traditional methods are often more reliable.
items.text_zh: 我认为传统的方法往往更可靠。

items.text: I am a responsible and dependable person.
items.text_en: I am a responsible and dependable person.
items.text_zh: 我是个有责任感、值得信赖的人。

items.text: I have many plans for self-improvement.
items.text_en: I have many plans for self-improvement.
items.text_zh: 我有很多关于自我提升的计划。

items.text: I try to make sure every detail is accurate.
items.text_en: I try to make sure every detail is accurate.
items.text_zh: 我会尽量确保每个细节都准确无误。

items.text: I enjoy taking care of people and responding to their needs.
items.text_en: I enjoy taking care of people and responding to their needs.
items.text_zh: 我很享受照顾别人、回应他人需求的过程。

items.text: I want to be someone other people admire.
items.text_en: I want to be someone other people admire.
items.text_zh: 我想成为一个让别人钦佩的人。

items.text: In order to succeed, I keep pushing myself forward.
items.text_en: In order to succeed, I keep pushing myself forward.
items.text_zh: 为了获得成功，我会不断逼自己往前走。

items.text: I believe I have made an important contribution to my community or group.
items.text_en: I believe I have made an important contribution to my community or group.
items.text_zh: 我觉得自己为所在的社区或集体做出了重要贡献。

items.text: I am usually emotionally steady and do not have a lot of dramatic ups and downs.
items.text_en: I am usually emotionally steady and do not have a lot of dramatic ups and downs.
items.text_zh: 我通常能保持情绪稳定，很少有大起大落的时候。

items.text: I often feel that I do not truly belong in any group.
items.text_en: I often feel that I do not truly belong in any group.
items.text_zh: 我常觉得自己在任何圈子里都没有真正的归属感。

items.text: I want to understand as much as I can about how the world works.
items.text_en: I want to understand as much as I can about how the world works.
items.text_zh: 我渴望尽可能多地了解这个世界是如何运转的。

items.text: It is very important to me to identify potential risks.
items.text_en: It is very important to me to identify potential risks.
items.text_zh: 对我来说，弄清楚潜在的风险点非常有必要。

items.text: I actively keep my life full and engaging so I do not get stuck in negative feelings.
items.text_en: I actively keep my life full and engaging so I do not get stuck in negative feelings.
items.text_zh: 我会主动把生活安排得充实一些，避免自己陷在负面情绪里。

items.text: Trying new things helps keep my life interesting and full of energy.
items.text_en: Trying new things helps keep my life interesting and full of energy.
items.text_zh: 尝试新鲜事物能让我的生活保持有趣和有活力。

items.text: I am a positive and upbeat person.
items.text_en: I am a positive and upbeat person.
items.text_zh: 我是一个积极开朗的人。

items.text: When other people hold back, I am usually the one who speaks up.
items.text_en: When other people hold back, I am usually the one who speaks up.
items.text_zh: 当别人退缩时，我通常会站出来表明态度。

items.text: Other people usually have stronger opinions than I do.
items.text_en: Other people usually have stronger opinions than I do.
items.text_zh: 别人的主见通常比我更强。

items.text: I believe everyone should fulfill their role and carry out their responsibilities.
items.text_en: I believe everyone should fulfill their role and carry out their responsibilities.
items.text_zh: 我认为每个人都应该守好自己的角色，并尽到相应的责任。

items.text: I care a lot about protecting what I already have.
items.text_en: I care a lot about protecting what I already have.
items.text_zh: 我很在意保护好自己已经拥有的东西。

items.text: I often have a fairly clear sense of where my future is headed.
items.text_en: I often have a fairly clear sense of where my future is headed.
items.text_zh: 我对自己的未来常有比较清晰的预感。

items.text: My interests are pretty similar to those of most people, and there is nothing especially unusual about them.
items.text_en: My interests are pretty similar to those of most people, and there is nothing especially unusual about them.
items.text_zh: 我的兴趣爱好和大多数人比较接近，没有什么特别与众不同的地方。

items.text: I try new methods just to see whether they will work.
items.text_en: I try new methods just to see whether they will work.
items.text_zh: 我会尝试新方法，只是想看看它是否行得通。

items.text: I have strong willpower.
items.text_en: I have strong willpower.
items.text_zh: 我有很强的意志力。

items.text: Continually improving and refining myself has long been important to me.
items.text_en: Continually improving and refining myself has long been important to me.
items.text_zh: 如何持续提升和完善自己，是我长期很在意的一件事。

items.text: 我做事时通常会追求尽善尽美。
items.text_en: I usually strive to do things as perfectly as possible.
items.text_zh: 我做事时通常会追求尽善尽美。

items.text: 我通常会尽力帮助他人。
items.text_en: I usually do my best to help others.
items.text_zh: 我通常会尽力帮助他人。

items.text: 我很在意别人是否喜欢我。
items.text_en: It matters a lot to me whether other people like me.
items.text_zh: 我很在意别人是否喜欢我。

items.text: 对我来说，成就一番事业非常重要。
items.text_en: It is very important to me to accomplish something significant in life.
items.text_zh: 对我来说，成就一番事业非常重要。

items.text: 在很多事情上，我通常能做出比较关键的贡献。
items.text_en: In many situations, I am able to make a key contribution.
items.text_zh: 在很多事情上，我通常能做出比较关键的贡献。

items.text: 我的情绪体验通常比较深刻而丰富。
items.text_en: I tend to experience my emotions deeply.
items.text_zh: 我的情绪体验通常比较深刻而丰富。

items.text: 我常觉得别人很难真正理解我。
items.text_en: I often feel that other people do not truly understand me.
items.text_zh: 我常觉得别人很难真正理解我。

items.text: 我喜欢深入思考问题。
items.text_en: I enjoy thinking about things in depth.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢深入思考问题。

items.text: 我习惯提前为可能出现的风险或突发情况做准备。
items.text_en: I tend to prepare ahead of time for possible risks or unexpected problems.
items.text_zh: 我习惯提前为可能出现的风险或突发情况做准备。

items.text: 对我来说，尽量避免痛苦和不适非常重要。
items.text_en: It is very important to me to avoid pain and discomfort whenever I can.
items.text_zh: 对我来说，尽量避免痛苦和不适非常重要。

items.text: 我会主动寻找能让我感到快乐或兴奋的体验。
items.text_en: I actively seek out experiences that make me feel happy or excited.
items.text_zh: 我会主动寻找能让我感到快乐或兴奋的体验。

items.text: 无论处境如何，我都倾向于看到积极的一面。
items.text_en: No matter the situation, I tend to focus on the positive side.
items.text_zh: 无论处境如何，我都倾向于看到积极的一面。

items.text: 当我认为别人有问题时，我会直接指出来。
items.text_en: When I think someone is wrong, I say so directly.
items.text_zh: 当我认为别人有问题时，我会直接指出来。

items.text: 我习惯由别人来做决定。
items.text_en: I tend to let other people make the decisions.
items.text_zh: 我习惯由别人来做决定。

items.text: 我认为大家应该遵守既定的规则和制度。
items.text_en: I believe people should follow established rules and systems.
items.text_zh: 我认为大家应该遵守既定的规则和制度。

items.text: 对我来说，安全感是最重要的事之一。
items.text_en: Feeling secure is one of the most important things to me.
items.text_zh: 对我来说，安全感是最重要的事之一。

items.text: 我经常花很多心思去想未来可能会发生什么。
items.text_en: I spend a lot of time thinking about what might happen in the future.
items.text_zh: 我经常花很多心思去想未来可能会发生什么。

items.text: 我常觉得自己和周围的大多数人格格不入。
items.text_en: I often feel out of place with most people around me.
items.text_zh: 我常觉得自己和周围的大多数人格格不入。

items.text: 我认为已经行之有效的做事方式，没有必要轻易改变。
items.text_en: If a way of doing things already works well, I do not see much reason to change it.
items.text_zh: 我认为已经行之有效的做事方式，没有必要轻易改变。

items.text: 我通常能按部就班地完成每天的琐事或日常事务。
items.text_en: I am usually able to handle everyday chores and routines in an orderly way.
items.text_zh: 我通常能按部就班地完成每天的琐事或日常事务。

items.text: 我一直在努力让自己变得更完善。
items.text_en: I am always trying to improve myself.
items.text_zh: 我一直在努力让自己变得更完善。

items.text: 我会非常仔细地检查自己是否出错。
items.text_en: I check my work very carefully for mistakes.
items.text_zh: 我会非常仔细地检查自己是否出错。

items.text: 我愿意把时间花在那些需要我帮助的人身上。
items.text_en: I am willing to spend time helping people who need me.
items.text_zh: 我愿意把时间花在那些需要我帮助的人身上。

items.text: 在社交圈中，我希望自己是有影响力的人。
items.text_en: In my social circles, I want to be someone who has influence.
items.text_zh: 在社交圈中，我希望自己是有影响力的人。

items.text: 获得成功对我来说非常重要。
items.text_en: Being successful is very important to me.
items.text_zh: 获得成功对我来说非常重要。

items.text: 我觉得自己在所属的组织中扮演着重要角色。
items.text_en: I see myself as playing an important role in the groups or organizations I belong to.
items.text_zh: 我觉得自己在所属的组织中扮演着重要角色。

items.text: 我经常感觉自己被情绪淹没。
items.text_en: I often feel overwhelmed by my emotions.
items.text_zh: 我经常感觉自己被情绪淹没。

items.text: 我一直觉得自己与众不同。
items.text_en: I have always felt different from other people.
items.text_zh: 我一直觉得自己与众不同。

items.text: 我喜欢从不同角度分析事情。
items.text_en: I like to analyze things from different angles.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢从不同角度分析事情。

items.text: 如果事情出了问题，我通常已经准备好了备选方案。
items.text_en: If something goes wrong, I usually already have a backup plan.
items.text_zh: 如果事情出了问题，我通常已经准备好了备选方案。

items.text: 我会刻意回避那些容易引发负面情绪的场合。
items.text_en: I deliberately avoid situations that are likely to bring up negative feelings.
items.text_zh: 我会刻意回避那些容易引发负面情绪的场合。

items.text: 我喜欢追求刺激和新鲜感。
items.text_en: I enjoy excitement and novelty.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢追求刺激和新鲜感。

items.text: 当别人抱怨时，我通常能看到事情积极的一面。
items.text_en: When other people complain, I can usually see the positive side of the situation.
items.text_zh: 当别人抱怨时，我通常能看到事情积极的一面。

items.text: 当别人做得不妥时，即使在公开场合，我也会直接指出来。
items.text_en: When someone is behaving inappropriately, I will point it out directly, even in public.
items.text_zh: 当别人做得不妥时，即使在公开场合，我也会直接指出来。

items.text: 我习惯顺着他人的意愿来做。
items.text_en: I tend to go along with what other people want.
items.text_zh: 我习惯顺着他人的意愿来做。

items.text: 我认为做事应该按规矩来，而不是各行其是。
items.text_en: I believe things should be done according to the rules, rather than everyone doing whatever they want.
items.text_zh: 我认为做事应该按规矩来，而不是各行其是。

items.text: 我会主动建立能给我带来安全感的人际关系。
items.text_en: I actively build relationships that help me feel safe and supported.
items.text_zh: 我会主动建立能给我带来安全感的人际关系。

items.text: 我往往能比较清晰地预见未来可能发生的情况。
items.text_en: I can often see fairly clearly what is likely to happen in the future.
items.text_zh: 我往往能比较清晰地预见未来可能发生的情况。

items.text: 我的某些兴趣或想法，在周围人看来会显得有点“怪”。
items.text_en: Some of my interests or ideas seem a little unusual to the people around me.
items.text_zh: 我的某些兴趣或想法，在周围人看来会显得有点“怪”。

items.text: 我更喜欢按熟悉的老办法做事。
items.text_en: I prefer doing things in familiar, time-tested ways.
items.text_zh: 我更喜欢按熟悉的老办法做事。

items.text: 只要任务还没完成，我就不会轻易停下来。
items.text_en: Once I take on a task, I do not stop easily until it is finished.
items.text_zh: 只要任务还没完成，我就不会轻易停下来。

items.text: 我会花很多时间去发现并改进自己的缺点和不足。
items.text_en: I spend a lot of time noticing my shortcomings and trying to improve them.
items.text_zh: 我会花很多时间去发现并改进自己的缺点和不足。

items.text: 我对自己的要求很高。
items.text_en: I hold myself to very high standards.
items.text_zh: 我对自己的要求很高。

items.text: 我天生就喜欢照顾和关心别人。
items.text_en: Caring for and looking after others comes naturally to me.
items.text_zh: 我天生就喜欢照顾和关心别人。

items.text: 我渴望得到别人的认可和赞赏。
items.text_en: I want to be recognized and appreciated by others.
items.text_zh: 我渴望得到别人的认可和赞赏。

items.text: 我希望在人生中实现许多重要的目标。
items.text_en: I want to accomplish many important goals in life.
items.text_zh: 我希望在人生中实现许多重要的目标。

items.text: 在处理问题时，我通常比周围的人更果断、更有效率。
items.text_en: When it comes to solving problems, I am usually more decisive and efficient than the people around me.
items.text_zh: 在处理问题时，我通常比周围的人更果断、更有效率。

items.text: 对于已经失去的人或事，我常会感到深切的悲伤。
items.text_en: I often feel deep sadness over people or things I have lost.
items.text_zh: 对于已经失去的人或事，我常会感到深切的悲伤。

items.text: 我觉得自己骨子里就是个很特别的人。
items.text_en: Deep down, I feel that there is something very distinctive about me.
items.text_zh: 我觉得自己骨子里就是个很特别的人。

items.text: 相比大多数人，我更愿意花时间去钻研事物的本质。
items.text_en: Compared with most people, I am more willing to spend time trying to understand the underlying nature of things.
items.text_zh: 相比大多数人，我更愿意花时间去钻研事物的本质。

items.text: 对我来说，提前准备好应对突发情况非常重要。
items.text_en: It is very important to me to be prepared for unexpected situations.
items.text_zh: 对我来说，提前准备好应对突发情况非常重要。

items.text: 当伤感涌上来时，我会找点事让自己分散注意力。
items.text_en: When sadness comes up, I find something to do to take my mind off it.
items.text_zh: 当伤感涌上来时，我会找点事让自己分散注意力。

items.text: 生活一旦变得无聊，我就会主动做些改变，打破这种状态。
items.text_en: When life starts to feel dull, I make changes to break out of the routine.
items.text_zh: 生活一旦变得无聊，我就会主动做些改变，打破这种状态。

items.text: 我往往比大多数人更乐观。
items.text_en: I tend to be more optimistic than most people.
items.text_zh: 我往往比大多数人更乐观。

items.text: 即使话可能不好听，我也愿意把真实想法说出来。
items.text_en: Even if it may be hard to hear, I am willing to say what I really think.
items.text_zh: 即使话可能不好听，我也愿意把真实想法说出来。

items.text: 我宁愿顺着多数人的意见，也不愿强行坚持自己的主张。
items.text_en: I would rather go along with the majority than forcefully push my own views.
items.text_zh: 我宁愿顺着多数人的意见，也不愿强行坚持自己的主张。

items.text: 在层级分明、结构清晰的组织里，我会觉得更自在。
items.text_en: I feel more comfortable in organizations with clear structure and hierarchy.
items.text_zh: 在层级分明、结构清晰的组织里，我会觉得更自在。

items.text: 我会尽可能采取各种措施，保护自己和家人的安全。
items.text_en: I do whatever I can to protect the safety of myself and my family.
items.text_zh: 我会尽可能采取各种措施，保护自己和家人的安全。

items.text: 我会为未来几年制定长期规划。
items.text_en: I make long-term plans for the next several years.
items.text_zh: 我会为未来几年制定长期规划。

items.text: 我觉得自己身上有一些别人难以替代的独特之处。
items.text_en: I feel there are unique qualities in me that would be hard to replace.
items.text_zh: 我觉得自己身上有一些别人难以替代的独特之处。

items.text: 我不太喜欢尝试新的方法或流程。
items.text_en: I do not especially like trying new methods or procedures.
items.text_zh: 我不太喜欢尝试新的方法或流程。

items.text: 我非常看重自己的责任和义务。
items.text_en: I take my responsibilities and obligations very seriously.
items.text_zh: 我非常看重自己的责任和义务。

items.text: 我喜欢阅读能提升效率或专业能力的书。
items.text_en: I like reading books that help me be more effective or develop my professional skills.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢阅读能提升效率或专业能力的书。

items.text: 为了把事情做好，我常会给自己很大压力。
items.text_en: I often put a lot of pressure on myself to do things the right way.
items.text_zh: 为了把事情做好，我常会给自己很大压力。

items.text: 我会主动帮助他人，让他们过得轻松一点。
items.text_en: I take the initiative to help other people so life will be a little easier for them.
items.text_zh: 我会主动帮助他人，让他们过得轻松一点。

items.text: 我会努力给别人留下好印象。
items.text_en: I work to make a good impression on other people.
items.text_zh: 我会努力给别人留下好印象。

items.text: 我为自己设定了雄心勃勃的目标。
items.text_en: I set ambitious goals for myself.
items.text_zh: 我为自己设定了雄心勃勃的目标。

items.text: 我是自己社交圈中的重要成员。
items.text_en: I play an important role in my social circle.
items.text_zh: 我是自己社交圈中的重要成员。

items.text: 我能细腻而深入地描述自己的情绪感受。
items.text_en: I can describe my feelings in a nuanced and detailed way.
items.text_zh: 我能细腻而深入地描述自己的情绪感受。

items.text: 我经常觉得自己像个局外人。
items.text_en: I often feel like an outsider.
items.text_zh: 我经常觉得自己像个局外人。

items.text: 我觉得自己的内心世界非常丰富，也很有趣。
items.text_en: I feel that my inner world is rich and interesting.
items.text_zh: 我觉得自己的内心世界非常丰富，也很有趣。

items.text: 我通常能敏锐地察觉到事情可能会出问题的地方。
items.text_en: I am usually quick to notice where things could go wrong.
items.text_zh: 我通常能敏锐地察觉到事情可能会出问题的地方。

items.text: 我很擅长避开那些会让我消沉的处境。
items.text_en: I am good at staying away from situations that bring me down.
items.text_zh: 我很擅长避开那些会让我消沉的处境。

items.text: 我通常愿意开启新的尝试或冒险。
items.text_en: I am usually willing to try new things or go on new adventures.
items.text_zh: 我通常愿意开启新的尝试或冒险。

items.text: 我相信事情最终会朝好的方向发展。
items.text_en: I believe things will ultimately work out for the best.
items.text_zh: 我相信事情最终会朝好的方向发展。

items.text: 即使可能冒犯别人，我也会坚持表达自己的立场。
items.text_en: Even if it may offend people, I will still stand by what I believe.
items.text_zh: 即使可能冒犯别人，我也会坚持表达自己的立场。

items.text: 我习惯让别人来掌握主导权。
items.text_en: I am used to letting other people take the lead.
items.text_zh: 我习惯让别人来掌握主导权。

items.text: 我很反感那些不守规矩、破坏秩序的人。
items.text_en: I strongly dislike people who break rules and disrupt order.
items.text_zh: 我很反感那些不守规矩、破坏秩序的人。

items.text: 我会主动结交那些能给我带来安全感和保障的人。
items.text_en: I actively build connections with people who make me feel safe and secure.
items.text_zh: 我会主动结交那些能给我带来安全感和保障的人。

items.text: 我习惯关注接下来可能发生的变化和动向。
items.text_en: I tend to pay attention to what changes or developments may be coming next.
items.text_zh: 我习惯关注接下来可能发生的变化和动向。

items.text: 我的兴趣和关注点常常与大多数人不太一样。
items.text_en: My interests and concerns are often different from those of most people.
items.text_zh: 我的兴趣和关注点常常与大多数人不太一样。

items.text: 我认为传统的方法往往更可靠。
items.text_en: I believe traditional methods are often more reliable.
items.text_zh: 我认为传统的方法往往更可靠。

items.text: 我是个有责任感、值得信赖的人。
items.text_en: I am a responsible and dependable person.
items.text_zh: 我是个有责任感、值得信赖的人。

items.text: 我有很多关于自我提升的计划。
items.text_en: I have many plans for self-improvement.
items.text_zh: 我有很多关于自我提升的计划。

items.text: 我会尽量确保每个细节都准确无误。
items.text_en: I try to make sure every detail is accurate.
items.text_zh: 我会尽量确保每个细节都准确无误。

items.text: 我很享受照顾别人、回应他人需求的过程。
items.text_en: I enjoy taking care of people and responding to their needs.
items.text_zh: 我很享受照顾别人、回应他人需求的过程。

items.text: 我想成为一个让别人钦佩的人。
items.text_en: I want to be someone other people admire.
items.text_zh: 我想成为一个让别人钦佩的人。

items.text: 为了获得成功，我会不断逼自己往前走。
items.text_en: In order to succeed, I keep pushing myself forward.
items.text_zh: 为了获得成功，我会不断逼自己往前走。

items.text: 我觉得自己为所在的社区或集体做出了重要贡献。
items.text_en: I believe I have made an important contribution to my community or group.
items.text_zh: 我觉得自己为所在的社区或集体做出了重要贡献。

items.text: 我通常能保持情绪稳定，很少有大起大落的时候。
items.text_en: I am usually emotionally steady and do not have a lot of dramatic ups and downs.
items.text_zh: 我通常能保持情绪稳定，很少有大起大落的时候。

items.text: 我常觉得自己在任何圈子里都没有真正的归属感。
items.text_en: I often feel that I do not truly belong in any group.
items.text_zh: 我常觉得自己在任何圈子里都没有真正的归属感。

items.text: 我渴望尽可能多地了解这个世界是如何运转的。
items.text_en: I want to understand as much as I can about how the world works.
items.text_zh: 我渴望尽可能多地了解这个世界是如何运转的。

items.text: 对我来说，弄清楚潜在的风险点非常有必要。
items.text_en: It is very important to me to identify potential risks.
items.text_zh: 对我来说，弄清楚潜在的风险点非常有必要。

items.text: 我会主动把生活安排得充实一些，避免自己陷在负面情绪里。
items.text_en: I actively keep my life full and engaging so I do not get stuck in negative feelings.
items.text_zh: 我会主动把生活安排得充实一些，避免自己陷在负面情绪里。

items.text: 尝试新鲜事物能让我的生活保持有趣和有活力。
items.text_en: Trying new things helps keep my life interesting and full of energy.
items.text_zh: 尝试新鲜事物能让我的生活保持有趣和有活力。

items.text: 我是一个积极开朗的人。
items.text_en: I am a positive and upbeat person.
items.text_zh: 我是一个积极开朗的人。

items.text: 当别人退缩时，我通常会站出来表明态度。
items.text_en: When other people hold back, I am usually the one who speaks up.
items.text_zh: 当别人退缩时，我通常会站出来表明态度。

items.text: 别人的主见通常比我更强。
items.text_en: Other people usually have stronger opinions than I do.
items.text_zh: 别人的主见通常比我更强。

items.text: 我认为每个人都应该守好自己的角色，并尽到相应的责任。
items.text_en: I believe everyone should fulfill their role and carry out their responsibilities.
items.text_zh: 我认为每个人都应该守好自己的角色，并尽到相应的责任。

items.text: 我很在意保护好自己已经拥有的东西。
items.text_en: I care a lot about protecting what I already have.
items.text_zh: 我很在意保护好自己已经拥有的东西。

items.text: 我对自己的未来常有比较清晰的预感。
items.text_en: I often have a fairly clear sense of where my future is headed.
items.text_zh: 我对自己的未来常有比较清晰的预感。

items.text: 我的兴趣爱好和大多数人比较接近，没有什么特别与众不同的地方。
items.text_en: My interests are pretty similar to those of most people, and there is nothing especially unusual about them.
items.text_zh: 我的兴趣爱好和大多数人比较接近，没有什么特别与众不同的地方。

items.text: 我会尝试新方法，只是想看看它是否行得通。
items.text_en: I try new methods just to see whether they will work.
items.text_zh: 我会尝试新方法，只是想看看它是否行得通。

items.text: 我有很强的意志力。
items.text_en: I have strong willpower.
items.text_zh: 我有很强的意志力。

items.text: 如何持续提升和完善自己，是我长期很在意的一件事。
items.text_en: Continually improving and refining myself has long been important to me.
items.text_zh: 如何持续提升和完善自己，是我长期很在意的一件事。
